Possibly: Multi-Channel Platform or Merchant Control Panel integration
May require direct PayApp support or legacy vendor contact

sections.name: Ucan Sign (Not Available Online)

May be integrated with third-party e-signature provider (Ucan is Korean e-signature vendor)

No code references to 'blog', 'blogpay' in codebase
Possibly: Naver Blog or content creator payment settlement system
PayApp may offer specialized payment gateway for blog platforms/creators
May be part of PayApp's ecosystem but not core payment API
sections.notes: Low priority - not applicable to CRM business model unless Naver Blog integration planned

fullyCovered.name: Payment Request (결제요청)
fullyCovered.purpose: Generate payment checkout URL for customers
methods: REST API: POST to https://api.payapp.kr/oapi/apiLoad.html with cmd=payrequest
fullyCovered.responseFormat: URL-encoded query string: state=1|0, mul_no (transaction ID), payurl (checkout), errorMessage
fullyCovered.security: No request signature required; linkval verified in webhook response
fullyCovered.relevance: high - Core mabiz-crm feature (Payment > Order Management)
fullyCovered.mabizUsage: Used for affiliate contract payment, landing page payment requests

fullyCovered.name: Payment Cancellation (결제 취소)
fullyCovered.purpose: Cancel/refund approved payments or cancel pending requests
methods: paycancelreq: Post-settlement refund request (D+5 and after, requires dpname)
fullyCovered.security: linkkey required - equivalent to API key for payment operations
fullyCovered.mabizUsage: Implement refund flow for affiliate disputes, partial payment cancellations

fullyCovered.name: Recurring Payment (정기결제)
fullyCovered.purpose: Enable subscription/recurring billing (Monthly, Weekly, Daily cycles)
fullyCovered.responseFormat: rebill_no (subscription ID for future operations), payurl (subscription setup URL), state
fullyCovered.relevance: medium - Optional but enables recurring revenue model
fullyCovered.mabizUsage: Implement subscription tier for SUBSCRIPTION_AGENT (10만원/월), monthly affiliate membership

fullyCovered.name: Webhook/Feedback Notification (결제통보)
fullyCovered.purpose: PayApp notifies CRM server asynchronously of payment state changes
fullyCovered.responseFormat: Server must respond with plain text 'SUCCESS' (200 OK) - any other response triggers PayApp retry (10 total attempts)
fullyCovered.security: CRITICAL: Timing-safe linkval verification (constant-time comparison via Buffer.compare to prevent timing attacks), IP whitelist recommended, linkkey in payload
fullyCovered.relevance: critical - Async confirmation of payment completion

fullyCovered.name: Cash Receipt (현금영수증)
fullyCovered.purpose: Issue electronic tax deduction receipt for cash/account transfer payments
fullyCovered.responseFormat: state, cashstno (receipt ID), cashsturl (receipt viewing URL)
fullyCovered.relevance: low - Optional for Korean tax compliance, customer convenience
fullyCovered.mabizUsage: Not currently implemented - nice-to-have for corporate customers

fullyCovered.name: Registered Payment / BILL (등록결제)
fullyCovered.purpose: Tokenize credit card once, charge repeatedly without customer re-entry (one-click payment)
methods: billPay: Use encBill to charge customer immediately (no UI, instant approval)
fullyCovered.responseFormat: billRegist: encBill (token to store securely), cardNo (masked), cardname
fullyCovered.security: PCI-DSS Level 1 compliance required - never store raw cardNo locally, use encBill token only, tokenization via PayApp API only
fullyCovered.relevance: medium - One-click subscription renewal, repeat purchases
fullyCovered.mabizUsage: Could implement for SUBSCRIPTION_AGENT auto-renewal (Day 30 pre-charge before expiry)

fullyCovered.name: APP TO APP Integration (앱 연동)
fullyCovered.purpose: Enable payments within PayApp mobile app using various methods
fullyCovered.responseFormat: URI callback with mul_no, csturl, cardName, cardNum (masked), installment, cardAuthNumber, goodPrice
fullyCovered.security: Scheme validation on callback URI, verify mul_no matches request, validate HTTPS callback
fullyCovered.relevance: low - Mobile app integration only, mabiz-crm is web-based
fullyCovered.mabizUsage: Not applicable (CRM backend service, no mobile app)

security_layers: Environment variable isolation: PAYAPP_LINKKEY, PAYAPP_LINKVAL in .env (server-side only, no NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix)
Timing-safe linkval verification: Buffer.from() + timingSafeEqual() prevents timing attacks (line 178-184)
Content-Type validation: Form POST only, no JSON parsing for webhook (prevents JSON injection)
IP whitelist opportunity: Not currently implemented, PayApp IPs should be whitelisted
risks: DLQ form-data vs JSON mismatch (P1-4/P1-11): PayApp webhook sends form-data but retry sends JSON - causes silent failures
Missing HMAC verification: Comments indicate future implementation needed for payload integrity
Webhook response validation: No verification that 'SUCCESS' response was actually received by PayApp

implemented: Affiliate contract payments - Live in production
notImplemented: MCP, Ucan Sign, BlogPay - Not applicable/Not found
blockers: DLQ retry reliability issue (P1-4/P1-11 - form-data mismatch)
No HMAC verification for webhook payload integrity

immediate: Contact PayApp support at support@payapp.kr to obtain MCP, Ucan Sign, BlogPay documentation
Ask if these features are deprecated or legacy
Request alternative documentation channels (GitHub, API portal, direct SDK)
forMabizCRM: No blocking dependency on Group E features - core payment infrastructure complete
Prioritize fixing DLQ retry logic (P1-4/P1-11) before implementing advanced features
If e-signature needed for affiliate contracts: investigate standalone Ucan SDK or alternative vendors (손글씨, KCOPA, SignEasy)
Defer Group E implementation until business requirement clearly identifies need for MCP/Ucan/BlogPay

riskAssessment.missingDocumentation: Low risk - Core PayApp features fully documented
riskAssessment.unknownFeatures: Medium risk - MCP/Ucan/BlogPay may have security implications if integrated without proper documentation
riskAssessment.estimatedImpact: No impact on current CRM operation
riskAssessment.recommendation: Defer Group E learning, focus on Group A-D (core payment features) and fix P1-4/P1-11

eSignature: Ucan (우칸) - Korean standard, payapp-integrated (preferred if docs available)
손글씨 - Korean standard for contract signature
blogPlatform: Naver Blog native payment (if Naver Blog integration needed)
Tistory Payment Gateway (if Tistory integration needed)

deliverables.findings: Group E documentation unavailable - MCP/Ucan Sign/BlogPay cannot be analyzed without source documentation
deliverables.coverage: Group A-D (core payment) fully documented and 90% implemented in mabiz-crm
deliverables.nextSteps: Contact PayApp vendor for Group E specs or defer implementation pending business requirement
